chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-96 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.463/2022 (U/A). 2. For orders on Office Objections at "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No.464/2022 (E/A). 4. For hearing of main case. ------ 09.03.2022 Syed Arbab Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioners. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. The petitioners by way of instant constitutional petition have impugned order dated 14.01.2022, passed by Additional Deputy Commissioner-I, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, whereby entry No.286, dated 06.06.1971 was cancelled as fake/managed with direction to Mukhtiarkar, Kandhkot, to maintain the record of rights accordingly. The cancellation of entry in revenue record amounts to denial of rights; therefore, the petitioners may challenge the impugned order by preferring an appeal before the Revenue Appellate Forum or by filing a civil suit before the Civil Court, having jurisdiction under section 42 of Specific Relief Act, 1877. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Manzoor
